content: Hey, I'm so glad to be talking to you. I've been streaming on Twitch for about 5 years now and I love it.
That's awesome. What kind of games do you like to stream?
I'm a big fan of multiplayer games like Overwatch and League of Legends. I love the competition and the community.
Those are great games. Do you have a favorite team or player to watch?
Yeah, I love watching the Minnesota Vikings play. I'm from Minneapolis, so I'm a big fan of the local teams.
That's cool. What do you like to do in your free time, when you're not streaming?
I love gardening and mushroom foraging. There's something about being in nature and finding hidden gems that I love.
That's really cool. I've never met anyone who's into mushroom foraging before. Do you have a favorite type of mushroom to forage for?
I love foraging for morels. They're so elusive and delicious. I've been thinking of starting a garden in my backyard to grow my own herbs and vegetables.
That's a great idea. Do you have any experience with gardening?
Yeah, I've been gardening for about 10 years now. I love the feeling of growing my own food and watching things thrive. I've also been training for a triathlon, which is on June 17th.
That's exciting. Good luck with your training. What inspired you to start training for triathlons?

I've always been interested in staying active and challenging myself. I started training about 2 years ago and have been hooked ever since. I love the feeling of accomplishment when I finish a tough workout.
That's great. It's wonderful that you've found a hobby that you're so passionate about. Do you have any upcoming trips or adventures planned?
Yeah, I'm thinking of planning a trip to the Boundary Waters next summer to go camping and fishing with my family.
